overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a winding dirt path through open grasslands under an overcast sky. The character approaches and passes a wooden gallows structure with a hanging body, continuing through the rural landscape with scattered pine trees and rolling hills.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural dirt path through open grassland

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the dirt path through open grassland with weapons strapped to his back

entered.detail: winding dirt trail with patches of grass and gravel
rolling grassland with tall wild grasses and low shrubs
open meadow with scattered wildflowers and tall grass
tall pine trees with dark green foliage lining the path
cluster of pine trees and deciduous trees with sparse autumn leaves
dense forest tree line visible on the horizon under overcast sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a winding dirt path through open grasslands. The landscape features rolling hills covered in tall grass and scattered pine trees on both sides. The sky is overcast with gray clouds, creating a moody, diffused light across the rural terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path with wooden execution platform

events.description: wooden gallows structure with hanging body becomes visible ahead on the path
path curves gently to the right while passing the gallows structure

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the path, approaching and passing the wooden gallows structure

entered.detail: tall wooden execution platform constructed from rough timber logs with crossbeam
humanoid figure suspended from the gallows crossbeam by a rope

segments.scene_description: As Geralt continues along the path, a wooden gallows structure with a hanging body comes into view ahead. The character approaches the grim landmark, passing it on the left as the trail curves gently to the right. The surrounding grassland remains open with scattered pine trees.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along the curving path away from the gallows, continuing through the grassland

segments.scene_description: Having passed the gallows, Geralt continues along the winding dirt path as it curves through the open grassland. The wooden structure fades behind as the trail progresses through the rural landscape with pine trees lining the route and overcast skies overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding rural path that transitions from a serene grassland into a grim encounter before returning to the open countryside. It begins with Geralt walking through rolling hills of tall grass and scattered pine trees under a moody, overcast sky. As the character progresses, the landscape shifts to reveal a wooden gallows with a hanging body, which the camera approaches and passes on the left as the trail curves gently to the right. The scene then opens back up as the grim landmark fades into the distance, with the path continuing its winding route through the pine-lined grasslands. Finally, the camera follows the character further into the rural terrain, maintaining the diffused gray light of the overcast heavens.
